strategy: PING frame flush after block response write (TLS buffer force flush)

ui_response.card_content: Warning text became first card outline title, then Gamma generated full presentation content from cached outline
ui_response.user_experience: Presentation generated normally - warning text hidden inside card structure

comparison_with_build9.sse_body: FIXED - Build #9 had EMPTY body, Build #10 has actual SSE event data with warning text
comparison_with_build9.ping_flush_effect: EFFECTIVE - PING frame flush successfully delivered SSE body through TLS buffer
comparison_with_build9.ui_rendering: WARNING delivered but consumed as card outline data, not displayed as user-facing warning

diagnosis.root_cause: PING flush fix resolved TLS buffer delivery issue - SSE body now arrives with data
diagnosis.gamma_specific_issue: Gamma interprets SSE outline response as card structure, so warning text becomes a card title instead of a visible error/warning
diagnosis.warning_visibility: Low - warning text is embedded in card outline JSON, Gamma renders it as presentation content
action_needed: PING flush fix WORKS for SSE body delivery - apply to all SSE services
For Gamma specifically: need different warning strategy since it consumes SSE as card outlines
Options: (a) return non-200 status to trigger Gamma error UI, (b) return malformed SSE to cause parse error, (c) return empty outline to prevent generation
